title: Identity provider partial outage impacts SSO token issuance
summary: Customers reported elevated login failures in the US-East region for 28 minutes.

title: Cloud object storage latency spike in eu-west
summary: Write operations were delayed due to a control plane networking issue.

title: Managed DNS provider reports intermittent resolution failures
summary: Engineering applied routing mitigation while investigating abusive query traffic.

title: Regional packet loss detected on subsea route
summary: Traffic was rerouted to alternate peering links; residual latency remains elevated.

title: SIEM ingestion backlog after queue saturation
summary: Burst alert traffic from endpoint detections created delayed pipeline processing.

title: MFA push delivery delays reported by multiple tenants
summary: A degraded messaging service caused delayed challenge notifications in mobile apps.

title: Endpoint telemetry API returns intermittent 502 responses
summary: Ingestion retries are succeeding but near-real-time detections may be delayed.

title: Email security gateway queue delay during signature rollout
summary: Mail flow remained active, but policy enforcement and quarantine updates lagged.

title: Threat intel TAXII endpoint timeout errors
summary: Partner feed synchronization temporarily stalled during backend maintenance.

title: Managed WAF control console unavailable in AP-South
summary: Traffic filtering continued normally, but rule updates were delayed.

title: Remote access broker maintenance window overrun
summary: A staged rollback restored session brokerage after change validation failed.

title: CDN edge cache invalidation backlog
summary: Security patch assets propagated slowly to edge locations during elevated demand.
